title: Xythan force shield
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Xythan force shields''' were a type of [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] newly created by [[Cestus Cybernetics]] in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]. The shields could absorb and return all energy, including the blade of a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
